func (*example.com/hello.Counter).Inc (v1 *example.com/hello.Counter)
  aux v6 = const Int(1)
  b0 -> []
    v2 = field-addr v1 #0 n
    v3 = load v2
    v4 = binop Add v3 v6
    v5 = field-addr v1 #0 n
    store v5 <- v4
    return 

func example.com/hello.Add (v1 int, v2 int)
  b0 -> []
    v3 = binop Add v1 v2
    return v3

func example.com/hello.Deref (v1 *int)
  b0 -> []
    v2 = load v1
    return v2

func example.com/hello.Spawn (v1 chan int)
  aux v4 = func example.com/hello.Spawn$1
  b0 -> []
    v2 = alloc heap=true
    store v2 <- v1
    v3 = make-closure example.com/hello.Spawn$1 [v2]
    go call example.com/hello.Spawn$1()
    return 

func example.com/hello.Spawn$1 ()
  aux v3 = const Int(1)
  b0 -> []
    v2 = load v1
    send v2 <- v3
    return 

func example.com/hello.init ()
  aux v2 = global example.com/hello.init$guard
  aux v3 = const Bool(true)
  b0 -> [2, 1]
    v1 = load v2
    branch v1
  b1 -> [2]
    store v2 <- v3
    jump
  b2 -> []
    return
